cooperates.cooperate_desc: Badang creates a wall behind enemy, you jump in and they have no where to escape as they are trapped. You would not need to worry about pushing away enemies with your first skill as badang sets a wall behind them.
Self explanatory. Atlas goes in and drags enemy together, you go in and secure kills. Easy combo. Just need be careful when you knockback enemies with you first skill.
Same as atlas.
Really good in team fights, she stun, you kill.

counters.counter_desc: Really op against heroes who does not have much mobility like layla, same goes for other heroes with less mobility.
Counters 90% of mages. They are too squishy. Easy targets

dominants.dominant_desc: Start opposite of where the turtle is gonna spawn so you can take turtle after getting to level 4 and after helping the exp lane. Don't be afraid to dive in for a 1v1 in the early game as his early game damage is crazy high. However try to avoid anything more than a 1v1 as their roamer might be around to disrupt u. Lukas can be aggressive early game to have a lead on the enemy so u can get more kills after buying skypiercer. The objective of the game is to take down enemy base to from the mid to late game, try not focus so much on kills and instead objectives like taking lord when enemy not around and even pushing turrets. There is nothing wring with pushing as a jungler just make sure you are not to far from your team. In late game, no matter how fed you are, the enemy will also be quite fed too, so don't be arrogant and jump into a 1v4 or 5 you are guaranteed to die. Instead, wait for your team to engage in temafights. Remember to target enemy main damage dealers first, normally marksmen. But if their team has a healer, they should be the priority to take down.

emblems.emblem_desc: Using fighter emblem gives Lukas additional spellvamp to increase his survivability. Using "thrill" gives Lukas additional physical damage which is really helpful in early game to deal more damage. Using "seasoned hunter" allows Lukas to jungle faster to overtake enemy jungler and get more fed. "Temporial reign" is the most important one, it reduces the cool down of his first skill after using your ult, this allows Lukas to use his first skill more frequently to significantly have more dps and survivabilty due to spellvamp.

equips.equip_desc: Tough boots allow more survivability due to it being able to reduce cc time. Skypiercer is a must to secure kills and burst down enemy heroes before they even realize. Hunter strike boosts penetration and movement speed to escape after going in for a kill. Queens wings boosts spellvamp AMD gives damages reduction for survivability. War Axe gives additional damage and health to Lukas as well as spell vamp to increase survivability once again and rose gold meteor gives damage and shield at low hp and stay in fights longer or to escape. Rose gold meteor and queens wings pairs well together to make lukas even harder to kill.

hero.hero_overview: A legendary Sacred Beast that can take the form of a rambunctious young man.
hero.hero_strength: One of his most important kit is to utilize his cc immunity when casting his enhanced first skill and during his transformation. Having cc immunity helps in disengaging enemy's set and formation. Never rush to use his first skill, as his main source of damage comes from his enhanced first skill after dealing 2 basically attack to enemy heroes or creeps, remember his cc immunity is only available for his enhanced first skill. Don't worry if you fail to finish off the enemy after using first skill, his ultimate skill after he transform and be used to snipe escaping enemies. Try not to engage in team fights when your ult is not ready. Pair his first skill with skypiercer gives you breathtaking results, sometimes even an easy savage.
hero.hero_weakness: Lukas becomes extremely vulnerable after you used all your skills but the enemy is still not dead. He would be rendered useless if he can't deal any damage, especially when he jumps in and a healer heals the other team. Lukas I also very weak against cc skills, even though he has control immunity, as long as you mange to stun him before he enhance his first skill, u can shut him down. Heroes like obsidian and minsithar can be used as a counter as they can prevent Lukas from using his first skill which counts as a dash. I think his biggest counter in game would be Karrie as she can shred him before he could even deal sufficient damage (Especially when she has wind of nature)

data.recommend: The most detailed guide for Lukas from a Lukas main with 80% winrate with MVP most of the time. Follow my guide to become top global Lukas!

spell.spell_desc: I recommend using Lukas jungle as its the easiest way for him to farm and get fed. Once you have an edge over the enemy, it would not be too hard to secure some early game kills. Lukas early game damage is considerably high so you can use him to rotate around and take down enemy heroes. More kills early game = smoother victory. If you are thinking "using him I exp with vengeance is way better", I get it. However after using him multiple times, I realized that as long as you are don't recklessly engage in fight, vengeance is not needed. His cc immunity is already enough to save him from risky situations.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Burst Damage:
Assassin emblem gives Adaptive Pen + high movement speed, perfect for Lukas since he thrives on quick in-and-out kills. His skills scale well with penetration.


2. Fast Jungle Clear:
The extra damage + penetration helps you clear buffs, creeps, and objectives faster — letting you rotate to lanes earlier than other emblems.


3. Snowball Potential:
Lukas is designed to get fed early. Assassin emblem helps you dominate from the first gank, one-shotting squishy enemies before they can fight back.


4. Mobility Synergy:
Assassin emblem talents (like Killing Spree / Agility) pair perfectly with his kit — making him faster after kills and harder to catch.

equips.equip_desc:
Playstyle Identity
Lukas is an Assassin-Fighter hybrid — his kit is designed to delete priority targets fast. A burst build maximizes this strength.


2. One-Shot Potential
With burst items (like Blade of the Heptaseas, Hunter Strike, Malefic Roar), Lukas can instantly erase enemy backliners before they can react.


3. Snowballing Advantage
If you get early kills with burst, you become unstoppable. Farming and objectives get easier because enemies are scared to contest you.


4. Synergy with Assassin Emblem
Burst build + Assassin emblem

spell.spell_desc:
1. Faster Farming: Retribution lets you clear jungle creeps quicker, which is vital for Lukas since he needs gold/exp to spike early.


2. Securing Objectives: You can secure Turtle and Lord against enemy junglers. Without Retribution, you risk losing these key objectives.


3. Chasing & Finishing: Upgraded Retribution (Ice, Flame, Bloody) helps you slow enemies, deal extra damage, or sustain in fights — giving Lukas more impact.


4. Meta-Standard for Junglers: In ranked or tournaments, almost every jungler must take Retribution — otherwise you fall behind.

dominants.dominant_desc: Lukas should roam with support until level 4. After level 4, he should first gank the mid lane, then the gold lane and kill the turtle. Then he should play close to the exp lane and help his teammate in the exp lane in a possible enemy gank. If Lukas, who has gotten a few kills, roams with a support hero with crowd control, there is no game he can't win.

hero.hero_overview: Lukas is an effective jungle/exp hero in long games. With his endless energy and the right items, Lukas is one of the primary choices for those who love entertainment and power show.
hero.hero_strength: He can quickly jungle and effectively gank other lanes with his roaming skills. He can enhance his first ability that deals area damage with his ultimate, providing large amounts of health regen.
hero.hero_weakness: Lukas can be a bit slow against agile opponents (e.g. Hayabusa, Helcurt, Fanny, and Harley) and is also very weak against crowd control like Franco's ultimate.

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Best Allies for Lukas

Crowd Control Tanks  Roamers

Tigreal Atlas Khufra Minotaur
Their AoE CC lets Lukas dive in and burst locked down enemies easily

Vision and Poke Supports

Mathilda, Angela, Estes
Mathilda helps Lukas engage and escape Angela can ult him for shield and sustain Estes keeps him alive in sustained fights

AoE Mages

Vale Pharsa Yve Lylia
They soften targets or zone enemies making it easier for Lukas to dive and clean up

Fighters Offlaners

Paquito Yu Zhong Terizla
They pressure the frontline or backline  creating chaos for Lukas to pick off enemies safely

counters.counter_desc:
Lukas Weaknesses 

Squishy  Easy to kill if caught


Weak to CC  Crowd control cancels his combos


Needs Snowball  Falls off if behind


Target Reliant Struggles if he can't burst squishies


Vision Dependent Risky to engage without map info

hero.hero_overview:
Lukas is a high mobility assassin who excels at target elimination with fast paced combos He thrives in jungling, ambushes and reset based team fights. His skills focus on burst damage slows and dashes making him deadly to squishy targets 



Core Abilities

Passive Shadow Mark
Damaging enemies applies a mark Hitting marked enemies with skills grants Lukas cooldown reduction and movement speed


Skill One Shadow Cleave
Slashes in a direction dealing AoE damage Enemies hit with marks take extra damage and are slowed


Skill Two Phantom Step
Dashes through a target enemy dealing damage and applying marks Can be used for repositioning or chasing


Ultimate  Death Omen
Locks onto an enemy, dealing burst damage. If the target is killed shortly after the skill resets allowing Lukas to use it again
hero.hero_strength:
High burst and reset potential

Strong chase and escape tools

Great for cleaning up fights

Can snowball hard with early kills
hero.hero_weakness:
Squishy and vulnerable to crowd control

Needs good timing and positioning

Falls off if behind

spell.spell_desc:
Retribution Tips Quick Guide

Always buy jungle item to activate Retribution bonus damage

Use Retribution on buffs early for faster clear

Time your Retribution to last-hit Turtle Lord watch HP carefully

Use Ice Retribution to slow enemies during ganks

Use Flame Retribution to deal bonus true damage in duels

Use Bloody Retribution to steal HP from enemies good for sustain

Track CD do not waste Retribution on small camps before objectives

Secure enemy buffs if you have early pressure

data.title: Paramparam37

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
With Floryn's flower (passive), Lukas can gain much more damage. 

Even if floryn is far, she can heal Lukas with her ultimate.

Floryn makes a good combination to Lukas as she can give sustainability in teamfights so Lukas can tank all the damage while eliminating the whole enemy.

counters.counter_desc: Valentina can copy Lukas's ultimate and gaining herself all the enhanced skills. In addition, because of there's no cool down on Lukas ultimate, Valentina has a short cool down on her ultimate because unlike Lukas, she doesn't need to full a passive before transforming.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Always know your target. Don't get distracted to the front lines such as exp and roamers. Use your 2nd skill to go to the backline and wipe out squishy heroes.

But if there's a healer in the enemy side, don't hesitate to kill him/her if he/she is going to the front or even back.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Fighter emblem for extra defense both on physical and magic.

Thrill for extra physical attack

Seasoned Hunter for extra damage on objectives leading your team into having extra advantage on objectives fight.

Impure Rage for extra damage on creeps and also buffs.

equips.equip_desc:
One key reminder, before you finish your boots, finish first War Axe for early dominance especially on the first turtle fight.

This is the best hybrid, initiator build for Lukas and it is approved by pro players on MPL.

hero.hero_overview:
Lukas is a strong fighter scaling on early, mid and also late game. That makes using him as a JUNGLER overpowered. Before you use Lukas core, make sure you have a roamer that can sustain you such as Mathilda, Floryn, Angela, Estes Etc. 

Always start in the buff where the lithowanderer spawns. Fast clear the creeps beside and use retri to the litho. Then go to your other buff and now your almost level 4, don't hesitate to rush to the enemy just don't rush if the enemy is too deep. 

Don't forget to always 2 stacks your passive as it can gain lifesteal while using first skill.
hero.hero_strength: Lukas's strength is squishy heroes. That becomes him a perfect counter to assassin hero junglers. Don't forget to know your target. Always burst or target when teamfights the damage dealers such as the enemy jungler, marksman, and mage. However, if there's a healer on the enemy side, prioritize it.
hero.hero_weakness: Lukas's weakness is having many crowd control enemies. Such as Ruby, Valir, Vexana, Etc. as it disrupts the domination of Lukas leading to wasting seconds of your transformation just unable to move.

data.recommend: CRUISE RANKS AND REACH YOUR DREAM RANK NOW!

spell.spell_desc: Always choose Ice Retribution so you can get out of sticky situations, and you can also use it to slow enemies down so you can kill them.
